Who I Am

About Me

✦

Growing up in a family with two generations of service in the Indian Army, values like discipline, integrity, and respect were woven into my upbringing.

At the same time, living in a close-knit joint family taught me the true meaning of caring and the joy of sharing.

Professionally, I am a Cyber Security Specialist. While I am deeply dedicated to my career, I believe in living life to the fullest outside of work too. I'm a down-to-earth person who finds happiness in the little things. Whether I'm trekking up a mountain, traveling to new places, or enjoying a game of tennis, I love staying active and exploring the world around me.

My friends and family are my world, and I cherish the quality time I spend with them.

Partner Preference

Looking For

✦

"Someone spirited, well-educated, and deeply rooted in our Samskruti and Samskar."

I am looking for a companion who is modern in thought and loves to travel, yet remains deeply connected to Indian culture and values. A kind-hearted partner with interests beyond just work and home — someone to build a happy, supportive, and grounded life with.

If you feel our values and interests align, I would love to get to know you better.
